entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
An elective in Earth Science, Astronomy is a fascinating topic in which learners explore celestial objects, history, and philosophy. Teachers wishing for explicit instruction on topics related to world view should include the optional Crossroads text.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Science: Astronomy

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: Recommended for students in Grades 11-12, depending on math placement. Students should have completed Algebra 1 (Algebra 2 if taking Denison Success) and Geometry.
